title: jasminum tubiflorum
intro: Jasminum tubiflorum, also known as Star Jasmine, is a flowering plant species in the family Oleaceae. It is native to southern China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its ability to improve blood circulation and reduce oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its health benefits.
